policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="userPrompt" value="@{
      var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
      var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
      if (msgs == null) return string.Empty;
      var last = msgs.Last(m => (string)m["role"] == "user");
      return last == null ? string.Empty : (string)last["content"];
    }" />

    
      @($"{{content-safety-endpoint}}/contentsafety/text:shieldPrompt?api-version=2024-09-01")
      POST
      
        {{content-safety-key}}
      
      
        application/json
      
      @{
        return new JObject(
          new JProperty("userPrompt", (string)context.Variables["userPrompt"]),
          new JProperty("documents", new JArray())
        ).ToString();
      }
    

    
      <when condition="@{
        var r = ((IResponse)context.Variables["psResponse"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        var userAnalysis = r["userPromptAnalysis"] as JObject;
        return userAnalysis != null && (bool)userAnalysis["attackDetected"];
      }">
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          { "error": { "code": "prompt_injection_blocked", "message": "Prompt blocked by Prompt Shields" } }
